## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have documented any non-obvious code paths or intentionally omitted them because the code is already clear
- [ ] I updated the relevant docs, or documented why no docs change is required
- [ ] I called out scope boundaries, risk, and rollout considerations above
- [ ] I added or updated tests that prove the change works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally, or I documented the known test limitation above
- [ ] My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits format
- [ ] This PR is linked to an issue (`Fixes #N`)
